questions.question: When you pick up a new cone, how big should you cut the hole at the tip?
sounds_right: chhota sa, bilkul thoda -- zaroorat pade toh aur kaat sakte hain
pehle chhota kaato, badi hole se moti line aati hai
sounds_confused: bada kaato taaki mehndi jaldi nikle
jitna kaato utna hi theek hai, farak nahi padta

questions.question: If your lines are coming out thick and blobby, what would you check first?
sounds_right: ya toh hole bada hai ya main zyada daba rahi hoon
thumb ka pressure kam karungi, ya cone ka muh chhota hai ki nahi dekhungi
sounds_confused: mehndi patli hai isliye, paani mila dungi

questions.question: Someone asks you to fill a whole finger quickly and simply -- what would you draw?
sounds_right: ek bel -- lehrati line aur uske dono taraf pattiyan
wavy line ke saath patti banaungi, upar dot laga dungi
sounds_confused: kuch bhi bana dungi, finger mein kya dikhta hai

questions.question: What small things is every big mehndi design actually made of?
sounds_right: bindi, line, patti, adha chand -- sab designs inhi se bante hain
dots aur chhote patte jod jod ke hi bada design banta hai
sounds_confused: bade design alag hote hain, unka alag tarika hai
wo toh bas haath se aata hai, koi cheez nahi hoti

questions.question: Tell me how you would draw a keri on someone's palm.
sounds_right: tedha aansu jaisa shape, upar se muda hua, phir andar line ya phool bharti hoon
aam jaisi shape banake kinare pe dots aur andar jaali
sounds_confused: keri matlab bas gol phool hota hai na
wo bahut mushkil hai, direct nahi ban sakti

questions.question: When you do a full palm, where do you start and which direction do you work?
sounds_right: beech se shuru karke bahar ki taraf, warna haath lag ke kharab ho jata hai
centre ka phool pehle, phir ungliyon ki taraf jaati hoon
sounds_confused: ungliyon se shuru karti hoon kyunki wo aasan hai
kahin se bhi shuru karo, koi farak nahi

questions.question: What all goes into a simple full-hand design that customers like?
sounds_right: beech mein phool, ungliyon tak bel, tips bhari hui, kalai pe keri
centre motif, fingers pe bel aur tips solid -- bas ho gaya
sounds_confused: poora haath bhar do bas, khaali jagah nahi chhodni
jo mann mein aaye bana do, design ka koi order nahi hota

questions.question: After the mehndi dries on the hand, what should the customer do to get a dark colour?
sounds_right: nimbu-cheeni lagao halke se, der tak rakho, aur paani se mat dhona
sukhne ke baad ghanton rakhna hai, utaar ke tel lagao, paani nahi
sounds_confused: jaldi dho lo taaki design dikhe
sukhte hi utaar do aur sabun se saaf karo

questions.question: A customer complains her mehndi colour came out light. What might have gone wrong?
sounds_right: usne jaldi utaar diya hoga ya paani se dho liya hoga
kam time rakha, ya nimbu-cheeni zyada bhigo diya hoga
sounds_confused: mehndi hi kharab thi, aur kuch nahi ho sakta
rang toh kismat se aata hai
